brand.name: Heita
brand.tagline: Ubuqotho, umlayezo, kanye nezindawo zomsebenzi ze-AI ezihlanganyelwa kuhlelo lokuqala lwamaselula.

landing.intro: Heita inikeza abathengisi namabhizinisi amancane umugqa oqondile kumakhasimende abo — nge-WhatsApp, i-QR, kanye nohlelo olusheshayo olufakelwayo olusebenza kumahla edatha aseNingizimu Afrika.

features.joinDescription: Amakhodi we-QR esitolo, kumarisidi, kumathegi emikhiqizo, kumlayezo we-WhatsApp, noma isixhumanisi esiqondile — wonke umngeniso uphatha kuphrofayela elilodwa lebhizinisi.
features.messagingDescription: I-SMS, i-WhatsApp, i-push, kanye nezaziso ezisohlelweni zihlangana kube ngumugqa wesikhathi owodwa ngekhasimende ngalinye, eliphethwe yithimba lakho.
features.aiDescription: Isitolo ngasinye siqeqesha i-AI eyazi imibhalo kukhathalogi yaso, izimpendulo, nezinqubomgomo. I-Ollama ngokuzenzakalelayo, ifuya yefu lapho uyidinga.
features.loyaltyDescription: Amazinga, imivuzo, izithakazelo, izimali zokubhalisa, nezikhumbuzi zemicimbi, konke kuxhunywe kuwallethi eyodwa ikhasimende lakho elingayithwala noma kuphi.
features.pwaDescription: Iyafakeka, iyazi nge-offline, futhi isheshe kumahla edatha aseNingizimu Afrika asebenzisa empeleni. Akukho ukugcina kwesitolo se-app.
features.trustDescription: Ama-WhatsApp webhook aqinisekisiwe, ama-OTP angaphansi kwesikhathi, i-CSP ivaliwe, abaqashi behlukaniswe ngezinqubomgomo zerow-level.

auth.signInBlurb: Sikhipha kuphela amakhodi okungena ezinombolweni zocingo eziqinisekisiwe. Amakhasimende amasha kufanele aqale aqalise i-akhawunti.
auth.signUpBlurb: Siqinisekisa inombolo yakho yocingo ngaphambi kokwakha i-akhawunti ukuze ama-SIM aphindwe asebenzisa angakwazi ukuthatha ukwazana ngokuzimela.
auth.providerSuffix: I-Google ne-Apple sign-in zivela ngokuzenzakalelayo lapho zihlelwe.

home.summarySingle: Uyilungu kubhizinisi elingu-{count} futhi unamaphuzu angu-{points} kuwallethi yakho.
home.summaryPlural: Uyilungu kumabhizinisi angu-{count} futhi unamaphuzu angu-{points} kuwallethi yakho.
home.discoveryMatches: {count, plural, =0 {0 imiphumela} one {1 umphumela} other {# imiphumela}}
home.emptyBody: Skena ikhodi ye-QR esitolo esibambisene, vula isixhumanisi sokujoyina se-WhatsApp, noma thepha inkinobho yokujoyina kuphrofayela lebhizinisi ukuze uqale ukuzuza amaphuzu.
